movie.title: Bhabiji Ghar Par Hain! (2026) Hindi WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: In a whirlwind of misunderstandings, two rival neighbours, Vibhuti and Tiwari, find themselves on a riotous road trip with their wives, only to get tangled up with lovable gangster brothers, Shanti and Kranti, who turn a simple journey into an unforgettable comedy of errors.
